scenes.voiceText: I'll never find it...,Relax, I'm here.,You're not helping! Jack's search for inspiration has become an all-consuming task.

scenes.motionPrompt: Papers fly through the air as Jack frantically searches for a script.

scenes.voiceText: Hello? Is anyone there?,We're here. Always have been. As Jack searches for answers, the room begins to stir.

scenes.motionPrompt: Light bulbs flicker and dim, then brighten up again.

scenes.motionPrompt: Ideas swirl around Jack, as he tries to keep up with the room's rapid-fire creativity.

windowsScript.content:
@echo off
setlocal
mkdir "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within" 2>nul
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "I'll never find it...,Relax, I'm here.,You're not helping! Jack's search for inspiration has become an all-consuming task." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Hello? Is anyone there?,We're here. Always have been. As Jack searches for answers, the room begins to stir." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "This is just the beginning...,You're not listening.,Maybe I'm just hearing things. As Jack confronts his creative doubts, the room pushes him to new heights and new lows." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A cluttered radio studio, with papers and books scattered everywhere." --motion " Papers fly through the air as Jack frantically searches for a script." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A subtle glow emanates from the writer's room, as if it's coming to life." --motion "Light bulbs flicker and dim, then brighten up again." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "The writer's room takes on a life of its own, with words and ideas flowing out like water." --motion "Ideas swirl around Jack, as he tries to keep up with the room's rapid-fire creativity." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "d711c53ee2b9619d7bcc4f6a" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/the-voices-within_final_episode.mp4"
echo Episode build complete.
endlocal

bashScript.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "I'll never find it...,Relax, I'm here.,You're not helping! Jack's search for inspiration has become an all-consuming task." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Hello? Is anyone there?,We're here. Always have been. As Jack searches for answers, the room begins to stir." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "This is just the beginning...,You're not listening.,Maybe I'm just hearing things. As Jack confronts his creative doubts, the room pushes him to new heights and new lows." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A cluttered radio studio, with papers and books scattered everywhere." --motion " Papers fly through the air as Jack frantically searches for a script." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A subtle glow emanates from the writer's room, as if it's coming to life." --motion "Light bulbs flicker and dim, then brighten up again." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "The writer's room takes on a life of its own, with words and ideas flowing out like water." --motion "Ideas swirl around Jack, as he tries to keep up with the room's rapid-fire creativity." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "d711c53ee2b9619d7bcc4f6a" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/the-voices-within_final_episode.mp4"
echo 'Episode build complete.'

voiceCommands: python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "I'll never find it...,Relax, I'm here.,You're not helping! Jack's search for inspiration has become an all-consuming task." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --scene "01"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Hello? Is anyone there?,We're here. Always have been. As Jack searches for answers, the room begins to stir." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "02"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "This is just the beginning...,You're not listening.,Maybe I'm just hearing things. As Jack confronts his creative doubts, the room pushes him to new heights and new lows." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --scene "03"
renderCommands: python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A cluttered radio studio, with papers and books scattered everywhere." --motion " Papers fly through the air as Jack frantically searches for a script." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_01_studio-chaos.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A subtle glow emanates from the writer's room, as if it's coming to life." --motion "Light bulbs flicker and dim, then brighten up again." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_02_the-room-awakens.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "The writer's room takes on a life of its own, with words and ideas flowing out like water." --motion "Ideas swirl around Jack, as he tries to keep up with the room's rapid-fire creativity." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-voices-within/scene_03_mind-games.mp4"
executionNotes: Run voice generation first so every scene gets a concrete WAV asset.
Run the renderer second so each scene produces its own MP4 file in the job output directory.
Run the ffmpeg concat build last to assemble the final episode from the rendered scene clips.
